/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/tric_gpu.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tric_gpu.dir/src/tricount_gpu.cu.o CMakeFiles/tric_gpu.dir/src/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tric_gpu.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o tric_gpu   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
